text:
There once was a curious kitten named Whiskers. He loved to explore. One sunny day, he climbed up to the cat tree and looked down at his cozy bed. "Maybe I'll jump!" he thought.

He took a big leap and landed right on top! He meowed excitedly and scampered around. Later, he found some seeds and ate them. Suddenly, he felt sleepy.

Whiskers drifted off to dreamland, dreaming of endless fields of purple sunflowers.

One morning, he woke up with such an adventure in his mind! Today he'd find a river and swim!

Downriver he went, playing with fish. He swam closer to the bank. Suddenly, a big cat snatched him!

Whiskers tried to climb up. The cat grunted and pulled. He climbed! The cat laughed and hugged him.

"That's my good little kitty!" the cat exclaimed.

Back home, Whiskers curled up. Tomorrow would be another day full of
